Its massive, teal-green crystalline eyes sparkle with a starry, magical gradient, framed by delicate purple eyebrows and a curious, scholarly expression. Slung over its shoulder is a teal plush backpack, complete with silver moon-and-star embroidery, shimmering silver buckles, and a tiny jewel charm. The character wears a tiny white lab coat over its body and holds a small clipboard in one hand. Vintage scientific posters and warm wooden shelves line the walls behind it. no text
